title: athroisma hastifolium
intro: Athroisma hastifolium, also known as prickly-leaved athroisma, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. It is native to Australia and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Athroisma hastifolium include its ability to soothe and calm the skin, reduce inflammation, and promote the healing process. Athroisma hastifolium can be prepared as an infusion or decoction for its medicinal uses, making it a valuable addition to traditional herbal remedies.
